title: Alert Center
description: System alerts, governance warnings, and threshold-breach notifications across the platform. Aggregates alerts from all services: fleet health issues, readiness degradation, commercial payment overdue, provisioning failures, audit anomalies. Operator question: 'What system alerts are currently active and what is their severity?' Mixed: acknowledge and silence are writes; all other interactions are reads. Alert silencing requires justification and is time-limited. No VistA equivalent — platform-native operational surface.

dataSources.description: Active alerts aggregated from all service domains with severity, source, and recommended action.
